Subject: Confirmation of Email for QAQC Audit  

Dear [Recipient's Name],  

Regarding the upcoming QAQC Audit of Unigaz Office, conducted by BGC and AEB consultants on 31-10-2022, as per Ashghal's instruction, it is mandatory for us to commence the work for this project.  

Please confirm your availability to receive the necessary email communication regarding the audit.  

We appreciate your prompt response and look forward to your confirmation.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
